# SEO Meta Preview & Scorer

> Free, instant SERP preview and SEO scoring tool — no signup, no tracking, all client-side.

## Description

SEO Meta Preview & Scorer lets you paste a page title and meta description to see exactly how your page will appear in Google (desktop and mobile), Bing, and social media cards — before you publish. It provides pixel-perfect SERP previews, real-time character and pixel-width scoring, truncation warnings, and actionable SEO recommendations.

## Features

- Pixel-perfect Google desktop and mobile SERP previews
- Bing SERP preview
- Open Graph / social card preview (Facebook, LinkedIn, Twitter/X)
- Real-time SEO scoring: title length, description length, keyword placement
- Truncation detection with visual indicators
- Embeddable widget for third-party sites
- 100% client-side — your data never leaves your browser
- Dark mode support
- No account required, completely free

## URL

https://seo-meta-preview-scorer.usetools.dev

## Part of

usetools.dev — free web tools
